title: Sakleshpur Trip
story: Our first night together, where I got to discover a little more about you... including the fact that you are always prepared. 😉
quote: Some memories are special because they are the first.

title: Ooty Trip
story: We did all the little couple things, laughed, explored, and somehow made sure everyone knew we were together.
quote: Some trips are not just about places, but about the person beside you.

title: Our First Snowfall
story: We both wanted to see snowfall on the trip, and somehow the universe decided to make that wish come true for us.
quote: Some moments feel like they were meant to happen.

title: New Year
story: We might look a little weird in the picture, but I'll always smile looking back at it. Thank you for spending that day with me.
quote: The best memories don't need perfect pictures.
